meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your SaaS: User Onboarding for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate student case study.
content.answer_block: Scaling issues often stem from poor user retention rather than just code performance. By implementing a frictionless onboarding flow, you guide users to their 'Aha!' moment instantly. Use Antigravity to scaffold your state management and Claude Code to automate the integration, turning complex user journeys into simple, repeatable code modules.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect feature, yet your user retention charts look like a flatline. The problem isn't your code; it's the invisible wall between your application and your user's first success. When users can't intuitively navigate your app, they churn before they ever see the value you've built.

But here is the secret: scale is not just about server load—it is about user clarity. By automating your onboarding, you transform a confusing interface into a guided experience. This case study will walk you through building a high-conversion onboarding flow that proves your worth to users and adds a professional-grade feature to your student portfolio.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the single action that delivers value to the user. We will map this to a triggered sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current user flow and identify the friction points preventing users from reaching the primary feature. Suggest an onboarding sequence that highlights the 'Aha!' moment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze current project flow for onboarding bottlenecks'

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding State
steps.description: Create a robust state machine to track onboarding progress without cluttering your main codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean state management schema for a multi-step onboarding wizard. Ensure it persists user progress in local storage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create OnboardingState interface and persistence hook'

steps.title: Implement Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Use UI primitives to guide the user through the interface without overwhelming them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a reusable React component for a guided tour tooltip that anchors to specific DOM elements identified by ID.
steps.claude_code_command: claude generate 'Create GuidedTooltip component with framer-motion animations'

steps.title: Automate Data Seeding for New Users
steps.description: Ensure new users don't see empty screens. Pre-populate their dashboard with sample data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a function that detects a first-time login and injects a set of meaningful sample data into the user's dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement first-time user data seeding logic'

steps.title: Integrate Progress Analytics
steps.description: Track where users drop off in your onboarding flow to iterate on your design.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking to the onboarding steps to log completion rates for each stage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Add analytics logging to OnboardingWizard component'

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up before showing value; use 'read-only' modes to let users play with the app first.
Use a 'Progress Bar' at the top of your onboarding flow to gamify completion.
Keep copy brief; users scan text, they don't read it. Focus on benefits, not instructions.
Always provide an 'Exit Tour' button; forcing users into a flow they can't escape is the fastest way to lose them.
A/B test your onboarding CTA button color and text; it is the highest-leverage conversion change you can make.
content.next_steps: After completing your onboarding flow, deploy the update to a staging environment and perform a 'Usability Test' with a peer who has never seen your project before. Observe where they hesitate.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn casual visitors into power users. Don't let your code sit in a repo—deploy it, track it, and watch your retention metrics climb. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
